creator: christoph.mallon@gmx.de
text:
This is an update of the Jagged Alliance 2 port to version 0.2.
It includes
- Sound support
- Implemented more blitters, so now there are less graphics problems
- Fixed blitters
- Fixed scrolling in tactical view
- Fixed some crashes and memory leaks
- General code cleaning

Please update the port in the ports collection.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
